requirement_topic.en: AC EV Supply Equipment (EVSE) Safety Listing
requirement_topic.zh: 交流电动汽车供电设备（EVSE）安全认证
requirement_topic.zht: 交流電動汽車供電設備（EVSE）安全認證

summary.en: AC EVSE sold or installed in the US must be listed to UL 2594 (Standard for Electric Vehicle Supply Equipment) by a Nationally Recognized Testing Laboratory (NRTL). UL listing is required by the NEC (NFPA 70) and enforced by local AHJs. Products without NRTL listing cannot be legally installed.
summary.zh: 在美国销售或安装的交流EVSE须由经国家认可检测实验室（NRTL）依据UL 2594（电动汽车供电设备标准）完成认证。NEC（NFPA 70）要求NRTL认证，并由地方主管机构执行，未经认证产品不得合法安装。
summary.zht: 在美國銷售或安裝的交流EVSE須由經國家認可測試實驗室（NRTL）依據UL 2594（電動汽車供電設備標準）完成認證。NEC（NFPA 70）要求NRTL認證，並由地方主管機構執行，未經認證產品不得合法安裝。

standards_or_laws: UL 2594 (Ed. 3, 2022) — Standard for Electric Vehicle Supply Equipment
NFPA 70 / NEC Article 625 — Electric Vehicle Power Transfer System

summary.en: Chinese AC EVSE is typically certified to GB/T 18487.1 (Electric Vehicle Conductive Charging System — General Requirements) and tested by a CNCA-accredited laboratory under the CCC scheme. GB/T 18487.1 covers similar functional safety areas but uses different test methods, connector specifications, and approval infrastructure.
summary.zh: 中国交流EVSE通常依据GB/T 18487.1（电动汽车传导充电系统——通用要求）认证，并由CNCA认可实验室按CCC体系检测。GB/T 18487.1涵盖类似功能安全范畴，但测试方法、接口规格及认证体系均有所不同。
summary.zht: 中國交流EVSE通常依據GB/T 18487.1（電動汽車傳導充電系統——通用要求）認證，並由CNCA認可實驗室按CCC體系檢測。GB/T 18487.1涵蓋類似功能安全範疇，但測試方法、接口規格及認證體系均有所不同。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2015 — Electric Vehicle Conductive Charging System Part 1: General Requirements

gap.en: GB/T 18487.1 certification and Chinese CCC test reports are NOT accepted by US AHJs or OSHA as substitutes for NRTL listing to UL 2594. Exporters must retest and obtain a separate UL 2594 listing from an OSHA-recognized NRTL (e.g., UL, Intertek, TÜV SÜD). There is no mutual recognition agreement between the US NRTL program and the Chinese CCC scheme for EVSE.
gap.zh: GB/T 18487.1认证及中国CCC测试报告不被美国地方主管机构或OSHA认可为UL 2594 NRTL认证的替代品。出口商须重新测试，并从OSHA认可的NRTL（如UL、Intertek、TÜV SÜD）获取独立的UL 2594认证。美国NRTL计划与中国CCC体系之间就EVSE不存在互认协议。
gap.zht: GB/T 18487.1認證及中國CCC測試報告不被美國地方主管機構或OSHA認可為UL 2594 NRTL認證的替代品。出口商須重新測試，並從OSHA認可的NRTL（如UL、Intertek、TÜV SÜD）獲取獨立的UL 2594認證。美國NRTL計劃與中國CCC體系之間就EVSE不存在互認協議。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — required by NEC Article 625 and enforced by local AHJs; OSHA NRTL listing required for workplace installations
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for AC EVSE sold in China under GB/T 18487.1

source.publisher: UL Standards & Engagement / OSHA NRTL Program (osha.gov/nationally-recognized-testing-laboratory-nrtl-program)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese EVSE manufacturers exporting to the US must obtain NRTL listing to UL 2594 from an OSHA-recognized lab. GB/T or CCC documentation alone does not satisfy US requirements. Consult a qualified US compliance engineer before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 向美国出口的中国EVSE制造商须从OSHA认可实验室获取UL 2594 NRTL认证。仅凭GB/T或CCC文件无法满足美国要求。进入市场前请咨询合格的美国合规工程师。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 向美國出口的中國EVSE製造商須從OSHA認可實驗室獲取UL 2594 NRTL認證。僅憑GB/T或CCC文件無法滿足美國要求。進入市場前請諮詢合格的美國合規工程師。

requirement_topic.en: DC Fast Charging Equipment Safety Listing
requirement_topic.zh: 直流快充设备安全认证
requirement_topic.zht: 直流快充設備安全認證

summary.en: DC electric vehicle charging equipment (DCFC) sold in the US must be listed to UL 2202 (Standard for Electric Vehicle (EV) Charging System Equipment) by an OSHA-recognized NRTL. UL 2202 covers DC output chargers including combined charging system (CCS) and CHAdeMO configurations. NEC Article 625 applies to all EV charging equipment installations.
summary.zh: 在美国销售的直流电动汽车充电设备（DCFC）须由OSHA认可的NRTL依据UL 2202（电动汽车充电系统设备标准）完成认证。UL 2202涵盖直流输出充电桩，包括CCS和CHAdeMO接口。NEC第625条适用于所有EV充电设备安装。
summary.zht: 在美國銷售的直流電動汽車充電設備（DCFC）須由OSHA認可的NRTL依據UL 2202（電動汽車充電系統設備標準）完成認證。UL 2202涵蓋直流輸出充電樁，包括CCS和CHAdeMO接口。NEC第625條適用於所有EV充電設備安裝。

standards_or_laws: UL 2202 (Ed. 2) — Standard for Electric Vehicle (EV) Charging System Equipment
NFPA 70 / NEC Article 625 — Electric Vehicle Power Transfer System
SAE J1772 / SAE J2894 — relevant interface standards referenced by UL 2202

summary.en: Chinese DC fast chargers are typically certified to GB/T 18487.1 (general requirements) together with GB/T 27930 (communication protocol for DC charging) and GB/T 20234.3 (DC charging connector). Testing is performed by CNCA-accredited labs. The Chinese GB/T DC connector ("GB connector") differs physically and electrically from the US CCS (SAE J1772 combo) standard.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充设备通常依据GB/T 18487.1（通用要求）、GB/T 27930（直流充电通信协议）及GB/T 20234.3（直流充电接口）认证，由CNCA认可实验室检测。中国GB直流接口在物理和电气规格上与美国CCS（SAE J1772组合）标准不同。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充設備通常依據GB/T 18487.1（通用要求）、GB/T 27930（直流充電通訊協議）及GB/T 20234.3（直流充電接口）認證，由CNCA認可實驗室檢測。中國GB直流接口在物理和電氣規格上與美國CCS（SAE J1772組合）標準不同。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2015 — Communication Protocol for Non-vehicle Conductive Charger and BMS

gap.en: Chinese GB/T DC charging certifications are not accepted in the US. UL 2202 NRTL listing is required. Additionally, the Chinese GB DC connector is physically incompatible with US CCS (SAE J1772 combo) outlets, requiring hardware redesign for the US market. No mutual recognition exists between the NRTL program and Chinese CCC for DC EVSE.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T直流充电认证在美国不被接受，须取得UL 2202 NRTL认证。此外，中国GB直流接口与美国CCS（SAE J1772组合）物理不兼容，进入美国市场需重新设计硬件。NRTL计划与中国CCC之间就直流EVSE不存在互认协议。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T直流充電認證在美國不被接受，須取得UL 2202 NRTL認證。此外，中國GB直流接口與美國CCS（SAE J1772組合）物理不相容，進入美國市場需重新設計硬件。NRTL計劃與中國CCC之間就直流EVSE不存在互認協議。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — NEC Article 625 and local AHJ enforcement; NRTL listing required for commercial and public installations
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC and GB/T certification required for DC chargers sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese DC fast charger manufacturers targeting the US market must obtain UL 2202 NRTL listing and redesign connectors for CCS compatibility. GB/T certification does not transfer. Engage an OSHA-recognized NRTL early in product development. Consult a qualified US compliance engineer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向美国市场的中国直流快充制造商须取得UL 2202 NRTL认证，并重新设计接口以兼容CCS标准。GB/T认证不可转用。建议在产品开发早期与OSHA认可的NRTL合作。请咨询合格的美国合规工程师。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向美國市場的中國直流快充製造商須取得UL 2202 NRTL認證，並重新設計接口以相容CCS標準。GB/T認證不可轉用。建議在產品開發早期與OSHA認可的NRTL合作。請諮詢合格的美國合規工程師。

requirement_topic.en: Personnel Protection Systems for EVSE (Shock Hazard Protection)
requirement_topic.zh: EVSE人员保护系统（防触电保护）
requirement_topic.zht: EVSE人員保護系統（防觸電保護）

summary.en: US EVSE must incorporate personnel protection systems meeting UL 2231 (Standard for Personnel Protection Systems for EV Supply Circuits). UL 2231 covers ground fault protection, leakage current detection, and automatic de-energization to protect users from electric shock. NEC Article 625.22 mandates ground-fault circuit-interrupter (GFCI) or equivalent protection on all EVSE. These requirements apply to both AC (UL 2594) and DC (UL 2202) equipment.
summary.zh: 美国EVSE须配备符合UL 2231（电动汽车供电回路人员保护系统标准）的人员保护系统，涵盖接地故障保护、漏电检测及自动断电功能，以防止用户触电。NEC第625.22条要求所有EVSE配备接地故障断路器（GFCI）或等效保护，适用于交流（UL 2594）和直流（UL 2202）设备。
summary.zht: 美國EVSE須配備符合UL 2231（電動汽車供電回路人員保護系統標準）的人員保護系統，涵蓋接地故障保護、漏電檢測及自動斷電功能，以防止用戶觸電。NEC第625.22條要求所有EVSE配備接地故障斷路器（GFCI）或等效保護，適用於交流（UL 2594）和直流（UL 2202）設備。

standards_or_laws: UL 2231 — Standard for Personnel Protection Systems for Electric Vehicle (EV) Supply Circuits
NFPA 70 / NEC Article 625.22 — Ground-fault protection for EV equipment

summary.en: Chinese EVSE standards address leakage protection and ground-fault detection within GB/T 18487.1 and related product standards, with requirements for residual current devices (RCDs). However, the specific protection levels, trip thresholds, and test methodologies differ from UL 2231. Chinese standards do not have a direct standalone equivalent to UL 2231.
summary.zh: 中国EVSE标准在GB/T 18487.1及相关产品标准中规定了漏电保护和接地故障检测要求，涵盖剩余电流装置（RCD）的使用。但具体保护等级、动作阈值及测试方法与UL 2231有所不同，中国标准中没有与UL 2231直接对应的独立标准。
summary.zht: 中國EVSE標準在GB/T 18487.1及相關產品標準中規定了漏電保護和接地故障檢測要求，涵蓋剩余電流裝置（RCD）的使用。但具體保護等級、動作閾值及測試方法與UL 2231有所不同，中國標準中沒有與UL 2231直接對應的獨立標準。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2015 — Sections covering leakage and ground-fault protection
GB 14050 — Specifications for Residual Current Operated Protective Devices (type A/B)

gap.en: UL 2231 personnel protection requirements must be demonstrated as part of UL 2594 or UL 2202 NRTL listing; Chinese RCD and leakage protection test data under GB/T are not accepted as equivalent. US NEC 625.22 mandates specific GFCI trip thresholds (typically 5 mA for personnel protection) that may differ from Chinese GB requirements. Manufacturers must validate protection circuitry against UL 2231 through an NRTL.
gap.zh: UL 2231人员保护要求须作为UL 2594或UL 2202 NRTL认证的一部分予以验证，中国GB/T体系下的RCD和漏电保护测试数据不被视为等效。NEC第625.22条规定了特定的GFCI动作阈值（人员保护通常为5 mA），可能与中国GB要求有所不同。制造商须通过NRTL依据UL 2231验证保护电路。
gap.zht: UL 2231人員保護要求須作為UL 2594或UL 2202 NRTL認證的一部分予以驗證，中國GB/T體系下的RCD和漏電保護測試數據不被視為等效。NEC第625.22條規定了特定的GFCI動作閾值（人員保護通常為5 mA），可能與中國GB要求有所不同。製造商須通過NRTL依據UL 2231驗證保護電路。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — NEC Article 625.22 requires ground-fault protection on all EVSE; verified through NRTL listing process under UL 2231
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (within GB/T 18487.1 scope) — leakage and RCD protection required for EVSE sold in China

source.publisher: UL Standards & Engagement (UL 2231-1/-2); NFPA 70 NEC Article 625 (nfpa.org)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Personnel protection to UL 2231 is an integral part of US EVSE NRTL listing and cannot be waived or substituted with Chinese RCD test data. Manufacturers must test and document protection system performance through an OSHA-recognized NRTL as part of UL 2594 or UL 2202 certification. Consult a qualified US compliance engineer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 符合UL 2231的人员保护是美国EVSE NRTL认证的组成部分，不可豁免，也不能以中国RCD测试数据替代。制造商须在UL 2594或UL 2202认证流程中，通过OSHA认可的NRTL对保护系统性能进行测试和记录。请咨询合格的美国合规工程师。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 符合UL 2231的人員保護是美國EVSE NRTL認證的組成部分，不可豁免，也不能以中國RCD測試數據替代。製造商須在UL 2594或UL 2202認證流程中，通過OSHA認可的NRTL對保護系統性能進行測試和記錄。請諮詢合格的美國合規工程師。
